ConsentShield Banner Test

This page loads the ConsentShield banner script. The banner should appear at the bottom of the page. Click Accept all, Reject all, or Customise to submit a consent event.

Org ID: 94412c69-7916-4d1b-8e68-7ad120f68ed7
Property ID: cd63861c-ab3e-4ed8-ab6c-67862b22c7b2

Consent decision log

This panel listens for the consentshield:consent custom event that the banner script dispatches when a user makes a decision.

(waiting for a decision…)

Reset

The banner stores your decision in localStorage and won't show again. Click below to clear and reload.
